title: ctenium trinii
intro: Ctenium trinii, also known as Ctenium arundinaceum or "elephant grass", is a species of tropical grass native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenium trinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support digestive health. The herbal preparation of Ctenium trinii is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
